name: Beri
short: One Piece-themed economy system with Beri currency.
description: A full economy cog featuring wallet management, leaderboard, message income, role stipends, work/crime/hack/slut/rob activity commands, blackjack, roulette, dice, horse racing, video poker, coinflip, slots, and a full audit log. Runs alongside Red's built-in economy with its own separate balance.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores Discord user IDs, Beri balances, transaction history (actor, reason, delta, timestamp), message income cooldown timestamps, and role stipend collection timestamps.
author: UltPanda
install_msg: Thanks for installing Beri v2! Use `[p]beriset info` to check your config. Set up message income with `[p]incomeset info`, role stipends with `[p]incomeset rolestipend`, and an audit channel with `[p]beriset auditchannel #channel`.
